summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Owner Panel features. All backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. Password gate, Staff CRUD, Attendance marking, and Salary generation all functional.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)

passed_tests: Owner password verification - correct password 'owner123' grants access
Owner password verification - wrong password returns 401 error
Staff CRUD - Create staff with monthly/daily salary types
Staff CRUD - Update staff details (name, salary)
Attendance tab - Select staff and view calendar grid
Attendance marking - Present (P), Half-day (H), Absent (A) buttons work
Attendance summary - Shows count of present/half-day/absent days
Salary tab - Generate salary for individual staff
Salary tab - Generate All Salaries button works
Salary calculation - Daily type: (base * days_present) + (base * 0.5 * half_days)
Lock button - Logs out and shows password screen again
Back button - Navigates to home page
Owner Panel card visible on home page
seed_data_creation: Test staff members created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Panel features fully tested. Previous iteration_1 covered core POS features (Captain, Kitchen, Billing, Admin). All 5 modules now tested and working.
